title: Update a ticket with the spread form { ID, ...fields }
prompt: Create a ticket named "{recordPrefix}-{runId} update" with priority LOW. Then update that same ticket to priority HIGHEST. Output the ticket's numeric ID on the RESULT line, e.g. `RESULT: 12345`. (Priority is an enum: LOWEST=0, LOW=1, MEDIUM=2, HIGH=3, HIGHEST=4.)
